name: postgresql-admin-suite
description: Production-grade PostgreSQL database administration: performance tuning with EXPLAIN ANALYZE, index strategies (B-tree, GIN, GiST, BRIN), partitioning, vacuum optimization, streaming and logical replication, connection pooling (pgBouncer, PgCat), backup/recovery with PITR and pgBackRest, schema architecture with zero-downtime migrations, and security hardening with row-level security.
author: Supercharge Claude Code
